blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,456 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 42 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.3" of snow, highs of 37°F, gusts to 42 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 40.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 14" over the past week. Current depth: 54".
